steps.title: Recount events, not research
steps.content: The student needs the sequence of events the researchers proposed: Chrysalis came close to Saturn, tidal forces broke it apart, and the resulting debris formed Saturn's rings.

steps.title: Match the sequence
steps.content: Choice A reverses cause by saying ring debris broke the moon apart. Choice B gives only a general principle. Choice C correctly sequences approach, breakup, and ring formation. Choice D describes the researchers' process, not the proposed events. The answer is C.
